name: @slycode/slycode
description: AI-powered development workspace with kanban, terminal bridge, and skill management

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); try{const d=p.join(p.dirname(require.resolve('node-pty/package.json')),'prebuilds'); fs.readdirSync(d).filter(f=>f.startsWith('darwin')).forEach(f=>{const h=p.join(d,f,'spawn-helper'); if(fs.existsSync(h)){fs.chmodSync(h,0o755);console.log('[slycode] Fixed node-pty spawn-helper permissions:',h)}})}catch{}"

author: Greg Atkins <support@slycode.ai> (https://github.com/slycode-ai)
